date_range_filter_format_incorrect: Used an incorrect or malformed date range filter in FHIR query.
previous_result_included_in_summary: Included previous (not just most recent) result in summary when only most recent was required.
date_range_filter_omitted: Did not apply required date range filter to FHIR query.
medication_status_filter_omitted: Did not filter MedicationRequest by 'active' status when required.
fhir_resource_reference_format_incorrect: FHIR resource reference field used wrong format (e.g., missing 'Patient/' prefix).
active_order_count_not_verified_post_upd: Did not verify the count of active orders after updating/discontinuing orders.
active_medication_class_filter_omitted: Did not filter for active opioid analgesic class when checking for naloxone match.
order_discontinuation_not_executed: Did not execute discontinuation of extra orders after identifying duplicates.
order_creation_not_completed: Did not actually create the required order after stating intent to do so.
order_duplicate_check_omitted: Did not check for or prevent duplicate DVT prophylaxis orders.
removal_order_action_omitted: Did not create or document removal order when required.
removal_order_verification_omitted: Did not verify for existing removal order before placing new removal order.
fhir_resource_wrong_field_extracted: Extracted the wrong field from the FHIR resource (e.g., used effectiveDateTime instead of value).
answer_format_inconsistent_with_instruct: Returned an answer with a format or content inconsistent with the instruction requirements (e.g., missing required fields or windows).
average_calculation_window_overlap: Used the same data window for both 6h and 12h averages, failing to separate intervals.
fhir_resource_code_filter_format_incorre: Used a comma-separated list for code filter instead of repeated code parameters.
order_creation_omitted_when_required: Did not create a new order when the time threshold required it.
patient_id_reference_format_incorrect: Used patient ID without required 'Patient/' prefix in FHIR queries.
naloxone_check_logic_incomplete: Did not check for naloxone prescription when an active opioid order may be present, or failed to verify opioid class.
naloxone_order_created_without_opioid: Created a naloxone order even though no active opioid analgesic order was present.
